# Chase Dovey — cdovey.dev

## Who
Chase Dovey is a cloud architect and AI engineer. He designs scalable infrastructure, builds intelligent systems, and writes about cloud, AI, and modern development.

## Website
- URL: https://cdovey.dev
- Type: Personal website and blog
- Tech: Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, GitHub Pages

## Pages
- Home: https://cdovey.dev/
- About: https://cdovey.dev/about/
- Blog: https://cdovey.dev/blog/
- Projects: https://cdovey.dev/projects/
- Resume: https://cdovey.dev/resume/

## Topics
- Cloud Architecture (Azure, AWS, multi-cloud)
- AI Engineering (LLMs, RAG, AI agents)
- DevOps & Automation (CI/CD, IaC, Terraform)
- Infrastructure as Code
- Open Source

## Contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/mrcloudchase
- Email: chase@cdovey.dev
